OPV Standards

checklist

200-Point Inspection

Every vehicle undergoes a rigorous pre-delivery inspection by our certified technicians before reaching you.

description

V5 & MOT Certified

Full documentation, valid MOT, and V5 logbook provided with every rental. Zero compliance ambiguity.

security

Luxury Fleet Insurance

Comprehensive coverage included. Our policy protects you and the vehicle for the full duration of your arrangement.

Commission a Bespoke Fleet

Need a vehicle not listed? Our automotive specialists have access to the world's most exclusive marques. Submit a confidential request and we will source it within 48 hours.

SUBMIT ENQUIRY

Opulent Vault is Manchester's curated luxury lifestyle concierge marketplace.
